name: Grilled Lemon-Oregano Chicken Salad
recipeInstructions:
- In a resealable plastic storage bag, combine the lemon peel, lemon juice, oil, oregano, garlic, and salt. Add the chicken, seal the bag, turn to coat, and refrigerate for 2 hours.
- In a medium bowl, whisk together the mayonnaise, buttermilk, lemon peel, fresh lemon juice, garlic, and salt. Cover and refrigerate.
- Meanwhile, preheat the grill.
- Grill the chicken for 5 to 6 minutes per side, then slice thinly.
- Divide the lettuce, tomatoes, and chicken among four plates. Drizzle with dressing.
